name: bambu-mcp
description: MCP server for controlling multiple Bambu Lab 3D printers via MQTT and FTP. Manage print jobs, monitor status, control hardware, and transfer files.

tools.name: add_printer
tools.description: Add a Bambu Lab printer to the fleet

tools.name: remove_printer
tools.description: Remove a printer from the fleet

tools.name: reconnect_printer
tools.description: Reconnect a printer or all printers

tools.name: list_printers
tools.description: List all configured printers with connection status

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Get current status of a printer (progress, temps, AMS)

tools.name: get_version
tools.description: Get firmware and module version information

tools.name: start_print
tools.description: Start printing a file on a printer

tools.name: start_prints
tools.description: Start prints on multiple printers in parallel

tools.name: pause_print
tools.description: Pause a running print

tools.name: resume_print
tools.description: Resume a paused print

tools.name: stop_print
tools.description: Stop and cancel a print

tools.name: set_speed
tools.description: Set print speed level

tools.name: set_light
tools.description: Control chamber and work lights

tools.name: set_temperature
tools.description: Set nozzle or bed temperature

tools.name: set_nozzle
tools.description: Set nozzle diameter

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files on printer storage via FTP

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file to printer storage

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file from printer storage

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a file from printer storage

tools.name: set_recording
tools.description: Enable or disable camera recording

tools.name: set_timelapse
tools.description: Enable or disable timelapse recording

tools.name: change_filament
tools.description: Change AMS filament tray

tools.name: unload_filament
tools.description: Unload current filament

tools.name: send_gcode
tools.description: Send raw G-code commands to printer

tools.name: skip_objects
tools.description: Skip specific objects during printing

tools.name: sign_message
tools.description: Sign a message using Bambu app certificate
